home.headline: Order now directly from the vet
home.short_desc: Ordered before 8 p.m. will be shipped today (on working days).

checkout.address-warning: Please fill out all required address fields to calculate the shipping rate

contact.finishMessage: Your question/remark has been sent successfully. You will be contacted as soon as possible.
contact.headline: Ask your question via our contact form. We will contact you as soon as possible.

datasheet_desc: Here you will find the leaflet in PDF format. You can save this for possible future use. When clicking the PDF symbol a new screen or pop up will open.
datasheet_desc2: Voor een pop up moet uw browser wel ingesteld zijn om dit te toe te staan.
main-desc: The vet that saves you money
order-success: Your order has been processed successfully! Within a few minutes you will receive an email with the order confirmation. Also check your spam folder!
Please enter a correct email address: Please enter a correct email address

product.address-warning: Please fill out all required address fields to calculate the shipping rate
product.deliverability: Ordered before 8 pm will be shipped today (on working days).

shipping-fee: Depending on the country and the carrier a shipping fee will be charged between 3.95 euros and 7.50 euros.

advantage.headline: Vet-Direct Advantages
advantage.delivery_desc: On weekdays, order before 15:30h and we will ship the same day!
advantage.shipping_desc: Whatever you order, you never pay more than €6,50 shipping costs.
advantage.cheap_desc: Our prices are lower and you order easily from home
advantage.secure_desc: All your details are safe with us. Paying is done in a secure environment
